сознание.text: the state or quality of sentience or awareness of internal or external existence

эволюция.text: change in heritable characteristics of biological populations over successive generations

квантовая_физика.text: theories, models and concepts that go back to the quantum hypothesis of Max Planck

искусственный_интеллект.text: field of computer science that develops and studies software enabling machines to exhibit intelligent behavior

нейропластичность.text: ability of the brain to continuously change over the course of one's lifetime

этика.text: branch of philosophy that systematizes, defends, and recommends concepts of right and wrong conduct

свобода_воли.text: ability of agents to make choices free from certain kinds of external constraints

культура.text: shared aspects of a society's way of life

ген.text: basic physical and functional unit of heredity

вирус.text: non-cellular, submicroscopic infectious agent that replicates only inside the living cells of an organism

иммунитет.text: state of being insusceptible or resistant to a noxious agent or process

алгоритм.text: sequence of instructions to perform a task

нейросеть.text: computational model used in machine learning, based on connected, hierarchical functions

квантовый_компьютер.text: study of a model of computation

робототехника.text: design, construction, operation, and application of robots

бытие.text: the first book of the Bible

семья.text: group of people affiliated by consanguinity, law, affinity, or co-residence

еда.text: any substance consumed to provide nutritional support for the body; form of energy stored in chemical
